name: Loader
summary: A collection of animated loading indicators including bouncing dots, sliding spheres, and SVG spinners.
detailedDescription: Loader provides multiple loading animation variants using Framer Motion. LoaderOne displays three 16px rounded dots with neutral gradient backgrounds that bounce vertically (y: 0 to 10) in sequence - each dot has 0.2s delay creating wave motion (1s duration, easeInOut). LoaderTwo shows three spheres sliding horizontally (x: 0 to 20) with staggered timing - the second dot starts at -2 translateX, third at -4, creating cascading motion with 2s duration. LoaderThree uses an SVG-based spinner (implementation continues in source). All loaders use dark mode compatible colors (neutral-200/300/400, slate-500). Animations loop infinitely with repeatType:'loop'. The components are designed as drop-in loading indicators with consistent sizing (h-4 w-4 elements) and spacing (gap-2 between dots). Gradients run from neutral-400 to neutral-300 for subtle depth. Shadow effects add dimension to sliding spheres. These loaders are ideal for async operations, data fetching states, form submissions, or any context requiring clear loading feedback with polished motion design.
purpose: Provide visual feedback during loading states
Create polished loading indicators with motion
behavior: Animates dots vertically with staggered delays
Slides spheres horizontally with cascade timing
Uses easeInOut easing for smooth motion
recommendations: Use as a focal animated accent and pair with calmer surrounding components.
